questions: How should approval status be displayed in CLI ticket get and list commands?

answers.answer: Display as a separate 'Approval:' line in hlx tickets get (matching the existing mergeQueueStatus pattern at lines 57-59), and as a brief indicator appended to list output. The field is optional — shown only when present and non-null. No new CLI commands needed. JSON output includes the field automatically from the server response.
evidence: get.ts lines 57-59: mergeQueueStatus displayed as separate conditional line — same pattern for approval
get.ts lines 5-22: TicketDetail type needs approvalStatus?: string | null
list.ts lines 5-12: TicketItem type needs approvalStatus?: string | null
list.ts line 105: status column with padEnd(12) — approval indicator follows
product/product.md: 'CLI hlx tickets get shows approval line'

statement: CLI adds optional approvalStatus field to TicketDetail and TicketItem types. Displays as a separate 'Approval:' line in get and a brief indicator in list. No new commands. Two files changed: get.ts and list.ts.
